title: Totem of Melodie
description: This is a simple resource pack that replaces the Totem of Immortality with Melodie's design from Brawl Stars
body:
Resource pack that replaces the Totem of Immortality model with Melodie's face from Brawl Stars. When activated, it plays exclusive sounds from the character instead of Minecraft's default ones.

## Features:
- Custom Totem texture featuring Melodie's face (visible in first and third person)
- Varied and random activation sounds extracted from Melodie
- Compatible with Minecraft 1.21x

If you encounter any bugs or anything you don't like, please report it, and I'll gladly fix it as soon as possible.

This is my first resource pack, so any feedback is super welcome. Thanks for trying it out!

-Juztinnnn
